response: DataFlow AI, a data infrastructure startup founded in 2022, has recently completed its Series A funding round, raising $8.5M and achieving a valuation of $42M. With a team of 18 people, the company is experiencing rapid growth at 25% month-over-month and currently reports a Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR) of $120K, backed by notable investors such as Sequoia and Y Combinator (YC).
